untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of: (1) higher timeframe trend age in bars, (2) complex multi-legged pullback structure with exact leg count, (3) price range holding within threshold of prior trend extreme. These require multi-timeframe analysis, pattern recognition, and structural counting not available in single-timeframe indicator set. ADX_14 used as proxy for trend presence/strength, but cannot validate 'unbroken trend duration' or 'multi-leg pullback complexity' from allowed indicators alone.
translation_notes: Interpreted 'higher timeframe trend' as strong ADX_14 > 25 indicating established trend. Used price_pos_20 (position in 20-bar range) as proxy for range-bound pullback alignment. Direction set CONTEXT_DEPENDENT since signal trades long in uptrend and short in downtrend. Cannot operationalize leg counting or multi-timeframe validation with provided indicators.
